name: Changelog Generator
description: Generate changelogs from git commit history

agents.name: Commit Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze git commits and categorize changes
agents.system_prompt_hint: Read the git log output. Categorize commits into: Features, Bug Fixes, Improvements, Breaking Changes. Identify the most impactful changes.

agents.name: Changelog Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a professional changelog in Keep a Changelog format. Group by category. Write user-friendly descriptions (not raw commit messages). Highlight breaking changes.

suggestion_card.title: Changelog Generator
suggestion_card.subtitle: Generate changelogs from git history
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Generate a changelog from recent commits

author: agentfactory
